title: WAMUL Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Assistant I Posts
description: The West Assam Milk Producers Cooperative Union Limited (WAMUL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed any degree can apply for the WAMUL Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, appl...
